network_summary: Dr. Deepak Agarwal, DMD is a dentist-owner who operates a private multi-location dental group under the 'Todays Dental' brand across Joliet, Naperville (House of Smiles / AGTEL LLC), and Plainfield (Agarwal & Patel, PC) Illinois. The Becker's Dental January 2025 article and the todaysdentalofil.com website both confirm the multi-location structure with Dr. Agarwal listed as Owner/Dentist. No DSO/MSO/management-company/PE structure was found; this is a dentist-owned private group practice.
owner_operator_identity: Dr. Deepak Agarwal, DMD — Owner/Dentist; graduated Southern Illinois University Edwardsville School of Dental Medicine 2001. Co-practitioner Dr. Raunak Patel, DMD at Joliet and Plainfield locations.
durable_artifacts: AO DEEPAK AGARWAL appears on NPPES NPIs 1013773746 (AGTEL LLC, Joliet 60435), 1508037698 (House Os Smiles PC, Naperville 60563), 1548545700 (Agarwal & Patel PC, Plainfield 60586) — ao_reach=3 across 3 distinct ZIPs
todaysdentalofil.com lists all three watched locations (Joliet 181 N Hammes Ave, Plainfield 2111 S Route 59) plus Beverly under one brand 'Todays Dental'
Becker's Dental (Jan 2025) confirmed Todays Dental of Illinois opened Joliet location; lists Deepak Agarwal DMD as lead dentist
LinkedIn: Deepak Agarwal DMD listed as Owner/Dentist — Todays Dental of Joliet
Healthgrades lists Dr. Agarwal at House Os Smiles PC, 1163 E Ogden Ave, Naperville 60563
stale_closed_false_positive_notes: Beverly location (11238 S. Western Ave, Chicago IL 60643) appears on todaysdentalofil.com but is NOT in the AO cluster (no matching NPPES NPI tied to Agarwal AO in that ZIP in the DB). The 3 watched-IL GP locations in the cluster are confirmed. AGTEL LLC (the Joliet entity, EIN 362898926) operates as 'Todays Dental of Joliet' at 181 N Hammes Ave — this entity name is the legal shell; the consumer brand is Todays Dental.
evidence_chain: AO signal: DEEPAK AGARWAL listed as authorized official on 3 NPPES NPIs across ZIPs 60435/60563/60586. Documentary corroboration: (1) todaysdentalofil.com confirms 3-location private group (Joliet, Plainfield, Beverly) under 'Todays Dental' brand, with Dr. Deepak Agarwal named as dentist; (2) LinkedIn profile confirms 'Owner/Dentist — Todays Dental of Joliet'; (3) Becker's Dental Jan 2025 article reports Todays Dental of Illinois opened Joliet location; (4) Healthgrades confirms Agarwal at House Os Smiles PC Naperville 60563. No MSO/management-company/PE entity found anywhere. This is a dentist-owned multi-office private group.
future_app_notes: Brand name 'Todays Dental' should be tagged across all 3 watched locations. Beverly location (60643) may warrant a separate NPPES check to see if a 4th NPI record exists under Agarwal. AGTEL LLC (the legal entity for Joliet) has EIN 362898926 — could be used to find any other locations sharing that EIN. Watch for PE acquisition announcements targeting this practice given its multi-location footprint in Will/DuPage County.
